summary: Tested all 6 bug fixes in the Midwife area. All bugs are VERIFIED FIXED via code review and API/UI testing.

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warnings (cosmetic - uses boxShadow)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bugs tested and verified fixed. Midwife flow tested with Emma Johnson client. Contract was sent during testing (status changed from Draft to Sent). New appointments were created during testing.

bug_1_birth_plan_access.evidence: API test passed - /provider/shared-birth-plan/{mom_user_id} returns 200 for linked clients, returns 403 for non-linked users. Birth plan loads in UI without error.

bug_2_contract_birth_setting_prefill.evidence: Code verified - fetchClientBirthPlanData() called when client selected, updates birth_setting from mom_profile.planned_birth_setting

bug_3_contract_send_web.evidence: Code verified - handleSendContract uses Platform.OS === 'web' check, uses window.confirm() and window.alert() for web, Alert.alert for native

bug_4_invoice_click_nondraft.evidence: Code verified - Invoice card TouchableOpacity has onPress={() => openEditInvoice(invoice)} without disabled prop, clickable for all statuses

bug_5_breadcrumb_navigation.evidence: UI test passed - Clicking 'Emma Johnson' in breadcrumb navigates to /client-detail?clientId=... NOT to dashboard. Verified via Playwright.

bug_6_appointment_autoopen.evidence: UI test passed - No modal auto-opens on appointments page load. setShowCreateModal(false) called after successful creation (line 195).
